scripts.build:server: bun --cwd ../ui run build && bun run --cwd ../api ui-manifest && bun build ../api/src/index.ts --target=bun --outdir dist-server --external playwright --external playwright-core
scripts.build: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server && electrobun build
scripts.build:stable: bun run build:ui && bun run build:server && electrobun build --env=stable
scripts.release: osascript -e 'quit app "Remote Agent"' 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; pkill -f '/Applications/Remote Agent.app' 2>/dev/null; bun run build:stable && bun run install:app && open '/Applications/Remote Agent.app'
